#   glyphplotter --input 04CA.txt --output 04CA.svg \
#                --font <path>/pt-serif-expert_regular.ttf

fontSize 1100
labelFontSize 200
fillColor FFFFFF
drawBackground
fillColor 000000

# ==== Box: U+04CA
strokeWidth 20
strokeColor 9E9E9E
drawRectangle pen 0 1440 1400 -900 stroke
glyphMode fill
drawGlyph pen 392 0 /uni04CA
drawLabel pen 700 -800 center "U+04CA"
move 1400
